sections.paragraph:
Original: לוּשׁ o

Transliteration: lûsh

Phonetic: loosh

BDB Definition:

Laish = "lion"
  1. father of Phaltiel, the man to whom king Saul gave his daughter Michal in marriage even though she was already married to David

Origin: from H3888

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
